# Dar Al-Maarifa E-Book Store
> Global e-book store (English-first, bilingual AR/EN) with 10 expertly crafted titles in leadership, business, productivity, self-development, tech, health, finance, negotiation, content & languages. Instant PDF download. Prices from $9.99.

## Books
- [The Influential Leader](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/the-influential-leader) — A practical guide to developing leadership that inspires your team and builds a high-performance culture. ($19.99). Keywords: leadership books, how to be a leader, team management, high performance culture, Arabic leadership guide.
- [Build Your Empire](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/build-your-empire) — A complete roadmap to launch your startup and grow it to profitability. ($24.99). Keywords: startup guide, build a business, entrepreneurship, grow startup profit, business roadmap.
- [Deep Productivity](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/deep-productivity) — A work style focused on depth over fake busyness that doubles your output. ($14.99). Keywords: productivity books, deep work, focus techniques, time management, get more done.
- [Design Your Mindset](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/design-your-mindset) — Reprogram your limiting beliefs and build a growth mindset that never stops learning. ($12.99). Keywords: growth mindset, self improvement, overcome limiting beliefs, psychology success, mindset book.
- [Tech for Everyone](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/tech-for-everyone) — Understand the basics of programming and AI without a technical background. ($17.99). Keywords: learn programming, AI for beginners, tech basics, understand coding, non-technical guide.
- [Health Without Limits](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/health-without-limits) — An integrated lifestyle system for energy, focus, and sustainable wellbeing. ($9.99). Keywords: health and wellness, energy system, healthy lifestyle, nutrition fitness, sustainable wellbeing.
- [The Art of Negotiation](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/art-of-negotiation) — Learn the art of persuasion and agreement with confidence at work and in daily life. ($15.99). Keywords: negotiation skills, persuasion, deal making, communication skills, win agreements.
- [Smart Investing](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/smart-investing) — Fundamentals of building long-term wealth with disciplined, thoughtful steps. ($21.99). Keywords: investing for beginners, personal finance, build wealth, stock market basics, long term investing.
- [Content Craft](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/content-writing) — Write content that sells and builds a loyal audience around your brand. ($13.99). Keywords: content marketing, copywriting, write to sell, build audience, content strategy.
- [Learn Languages](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/learn-languages) — A practical method to master any language in record time without a teacher. ($11.99). Keywords: learn languages fast, language learning method, polyglot, memory techniques, self study languages.

## Blog
- [Leadership in the AI Era: 5 Habits That Still Matter](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/blog/leadership-in-the-ai-era) — AI changes the tools, not the fundamentals. Here are five habits every leader needs when machines do the busywork.
- [Write Content That Sells (Without Sounding Salesy)](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/blog/write-content-that-sells) — The best content teaches first and sells second. A practical framework for turning readers into buyers.
